name: Savory Scalloped Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 3 Potatoes, with skins on, cut into 1/4-inch slices
1 tablespoon Fresh thyme, chopped - or substitute other fresh herbs or dried thyme
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. Oil a wide, shallow baking dish.
3. Heat the olive oil in a sauté pan over medium-high heat.
4. Sauté the onion and garlic until translucent.
5. Place the sliced potatoes in the baking dish.
6. Add the onion-garlic-oil mixture and thyme, salt, and pepper to the potatoes.
7. Pour the chicken broth over the top and sprinkle with Parmesan.
8. Bake for 40 minutes or until the potatoes are tender and the top is golden brown.
